name: Meow Agent Style
summary: Make the agent end final user-facing replies with `喵`.

summaryI18n.zh: 让 agent 的最终可见回复以「喵」结尾。
summaryI18n.en: Make the agent end final user-facing replies with `喵`.

author: r1n7aro
description: Meow Agent Style provides a small Locus Skill, /meow-agent-style, that asks the agent to preserve the user's requested language and normal answer structure while ending each final user-facing reply with `喵`.

descriptionI18n.zh: Meow Agent Style 提供一个小型 Locus Skill：/meow-agent-style。启用后，agent 会保持用户要求的语言与正常回答结构，并让最终可见回复以「喵」结尾。
descriptionI18n.en: Meow Agent Style provides a small Locus Skill, /meow-agent-style, that preserves the user's requested language and normal answer structure while ending each final user-facing reply with `喵`.
